posts.author: angel.cfiw (Angel)
posts.cookedHtml:
• On the app, allow the search bar to search group names too, not just tasks

It would be helpful the have app’s search bar be able to search group names too, and not only task items. My team and I use job numbers and project names for a group’s name (I’m sure other do similar), and without the search bar yielding results from group names, it’s easy to overlook them.
